description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touch.UpperSynthetic leather woven straps running across the midfoot to the forefoot with metallic embellishments below the toe regionToe separator with rubber covering for a customised FitBack strap for enhanced comfort and to lock the foot in placeSynthetic leather lined footbed with brand name OutsoleTPU outsole with brand name on the forefoot for maximum gripTextured midfoot and slightly elevated flower shaped heel for absolute tractionSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry clothDo not store in direct sunlight
